summary: User uploaded 10 PDF files containing comprehensive blood test results from late April 2026. The results are exceptionally clean and normal across all major domains, which is highly significant for ruling out systemic, autoimmune, or inflammatory causes for the ongoing symptoms.

tests.notes: ANA Titer: Negative, ANA Pattern: Negative. Rheumatoid Factor: < 15.0. This rules out Lupus (SLE), Rheumatoid Arthritis, Sjogren's, and most mixed connective tissue diseases.
CRP: 0.34 mg/dL. ESR: 5 mm/h. No active systemic inflammation.
WBC 8.3, RBC 5.34, HB 15.7, Platelets 304. No anemia, no infection.
Glucose, Renal function (Urea/Creatinine), Liver function (AST/ALT), Electrolytes (Calcium, Phosphorus) all within normal limits. TSH 4.450 (Normal). Vit B12 297 (Normal).
HIV, Syphilis, Hep C, Hep Bs Ag are all negative. Hep Bs Ab is positive (>1000) indicating immunity/past vaccination.
